/usr/bin/c++     CMakeFiles/test_fiber.dir/test/scheduler_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_fiber.dir/code/coroutine/thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_fiber.dir/code/coroutine/fiber.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_fiber.dir/code/coroutine/scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_fiber.dir/code/mutex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_fiber.dir/code/util.cpp.o  -o test_fiber  zchlog/libzchlog.a -lpthread
